summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was chosen because the job is an inventory shard, close/merge/fix paths are disabled or unsafe, and each open PR has either proof/review/maintainer blockers, stands as an independent follow-up, or must be routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref must route to central OpenClaw security handling without affecting unrelated inventory PRs.
Standalone maintainer-signaled UI feature work; keep open and do not invent a shared canonical in this inventory shard.
Focused contributor PR with proof and rebase blockers; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Substantial focused provider-runtime PR with unresolved review/author status; keep open as independent inventory work.
Focused green contributor bug-fix PR needs maintainer review, but this inventory job cannot merge or close linked work.
Broad contributor fix PR with failing proof check; keep open for proof and maintainer review rather than closing or replacing.
Security-sensitive PR ref must be quarantined through central OpenClaw security handling without choosing a canonical dashboard path in this inventory shard.

needs_human: #77774 and #86460 overlap on Control UI overview redesign direction; maintainer judgment is needed if a future cluster wants to choose a canonical dashboard path.
#77973 is a focused green bug-fix PR with proof supplied, but merge is blocked by this job and requires maintainer review.
